zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Daubeny於大約1339年出生在英國薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓時，她的父親Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny36歲，母親Katherine de Thweng32歲。她於1370年2月14日之後與William Botreaux在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1433年5月29日在英國多瑟特塔朗特 克勞福德享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Daubeny于大约1339年出生在英国薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓时，她的父亲Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny36岁，母亲Katherine de Thweng32岁。她于1370年2月14日之后与William Botreaux在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1433年5月29日在英国多瑟特塔朗特 克勞福德享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Daubeny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Daubeny was born about 1339, in South Petherton, Somerset, England, her father, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, was 36 and her mother, Katherine de Thweng, was 32. She married William Botreaux after 14 February 1370, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 29 May 1433, in Tarrant Crawford, Dorset, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Daubeny est née environ 1339, à South Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Thweng, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Botreaux après 14 février 1370, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1433, à Tarrant Crawford, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Daubeny um 1339 in South Petherton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny 36 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Thweng 32. Sie hat nach 14. Februar 1370 in England William Botreaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1433 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Tarrant Crawford, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Daubeny è nata il circa 1339 nel South Petherton, Somerset, England, sua padre, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Thweng, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William Botreaux dopo il 14 febbraio 1370, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 29 maggio 1433, nel Tarrant Crawford, Dorset, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Daubenyが約1339年にイギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubenyは36歳，母Katherine de Thwengは32歳であった。1370年2月14日以後にイギリスでWilliam Botreauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1433年5月29日にイギリスドールセトターラント クラウフォードで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Daubeny(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 서머세트 소우스 페더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Thweng(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1370년 2월 14일 이후 영국에서 William Botreaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1433년 5월 29일 영국 도르세트 터아랜트 크롤퍼드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Daubeny nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em South Petherton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Thweng, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William Botreaux após 14 de fevereiro de 1370, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1433, em Tarrant Crawford, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Daubeny родилась около 1339 г. в местности соут петиртон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Thweng, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Botreaux после 14 февраль 1370 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 29 мая 1433 г. в местности таррант кравфорд, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Daubeny nació aproximadamente 1339, en South Petherton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Katherine de Thweng, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William Botreaux después de 14 de febrero de 1370, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1433, en Tarrant Crawford, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
